name: quiz-night-complete
description: Weekly quiz night with team format, prizes, and free entry

input.name: Wednesday Quiz Night
input.brief: Weekly pub quiz hosted by quizmaster Dave. Teams of up to six. Three rounds: general knowledge, music, and a picture round. Winning team gets a £50 bar tab. Second place gets a bottle of wine.

notes: Free event with host (not performer) — tests quiz-specific content generation
